productDisplayName: Fastrack Men New Analog Black Navy Watch
description: An absolute comfort for daily wear, this analog wrist watch from fastrack is stylish to look and durable too. Case diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed designer bezel for added durability, style and comfort Plastic strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Dark blue dial with hour numbers in white Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Button to throw light onto the dial for time display in low light conditions Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance at 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming
